title: dot.ink WAL Entry
description: A single record in the dot.ink Write-Ahead Log (WAL). Every entry is a self-contained, verifiable audit event. The chain of entries is secured by BLAKE3 digest chaining and Ed25519 signatures.

kind.description: EXECUTING=intent accepted, POST_EXEC=outcome recorded, SYSTEM_REVERT=compensation applied

decision_id.description: UUID for the governed decision (same across EXECUTING+POST_EXEC pair)

tick.description: Hybrid Logical Clock: upper 48 bits = Unix ms, lower 16 bits = logical counter. Monotonically increasing across the chain.

epoch.description: Monotonically increasing policy epoch at time of decision

idem.description: Idempotency key. Re-submitting the same idem key returns the existing digest without double-writing.

payload_digest.description: BLAKE3 hex digest of the agent payload bytes

prev.description: Digest of the preceding WAL entry, or 'GENESIS' for the first entry

sig.description: Ed25519 signature over the canonical JSON serialisation of 'rec' (hex-encoded, 64 bytes)

digest.description: BLAKE3(rec_json_bytes || sig_hex_bytes). Unique content-addressable identifier for this entry.
